label: CU loop • reveal a hidden control, then set it
query: In System Settings, open the Advanced section and set the Proxy Host to 'localhost'.
notes: Multi-step discovery: the Proxy Host field does not exist until the model clicks 'Show Advanced', which reveals it. Tests that the model acts to expose a control, re-perceives, and then targets the newly-appeared field — not give up because the target wasn't visible at step 0.
